summary: Iteration 147: Parapetti & Ringhiere (UNI 11678 / NTC 2018) feature - ALL 17 BACKEND TESTS PASS + FULL FRONTEND UI VERIFICATION. New 4th perizia type 'parapetti' successfully added. Backend prompt includes all required norms (UNI 11678, NTC 2018 par 3.1.4, UNI 7697, UNI EN 12600) and safety checks (altezza 100cm, scalabilità, vetro stratificato, sfera 10cm, morsetti). Frontend shows 4-card grid with Parapetti card selectable and placeholder text updates correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 147 fully verified the new 'Parapetti & Ringhiere' (4th perizia type). Backend: PROMPT_PARAPETTI exists with UNI 11678, NTC 2018 par 3.1.4, UNI 7697, UNI EN 12600 references. Checks for: altezza 100cm, scalabilità, vetro stratificato, sfera 10cm, morsetti. PDF PERIZIA_CONFIG['parapetti'] has proper legal norms and checklist. Frontend: 4-card grid with Parapetti card (Fence icon, UNI 11678 / NTC 2018 norm). Card is selectable, placeholder text updates correctly. FOTO_LABELS has 'vetro' and 'morsetto' entries. All tests pass. Note: Actual AI Vision analysis with real photos was NOT tested (would require uploading test photos and calling GPT-4o Vision API - focus was on configuration validation).
